title: juncus articulatus subsp. articulatus
intro: Juncus articulatus subsp. articulatus, also known as the jointed rush, is a perennial plant species belonging to the genus Juncus, characterized by its jointed stems and small, green leaves. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Juncus articulatus subsp. articulatus include the reduction of swelling and pain in joints, as well as its potential to combat infections and promote wound healing. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in infusions, decoctions, and tinctures to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
